zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Anne Leighton於1587年出生在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾費肯哈姆時，她的父親Thomas Leighton59歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Knollys38歲。她於1604年7月9日與Sir John St. John Of Lydiard Tregoze在英國米德萊可哈可尼結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1628年9月19日在她的家鄉享年41歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭維爾爾萊迪亞德 特雷格茲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Anne Leighton于1587年出生在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾費肯哈姆时，她的父亲Thomas Leighton59岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Knollys38岁。她于1604年7月9日与Sir John St. John Of Lydiard Tregoze在英国米德萊可哈可尼结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1628年9月19日在她的家乡享年41岁，埋葬在英国英格兰維爾爾萊迪亞德 特雷格茲。

nameMeanings.name: Leighton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Leighton or Layton. Most, as for example those in Bedfordshire, Cambridgeshire, Cheshire, Lancashire, and Shropshire, are named with Old English lēac ‘leek’ + tūn ‘settlement’, but Layton in Durham derives from Old English ge-lād ‘road’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The English pronunciation of Leighton is usually /lɛ:tən/ or /leitən/ (also spelled Layton and Leaton ), but it can also be heard as /laitən/ or as /li:tən/ (also spelled Leaton ), and occasionally as /lɛtən/ (spelled Letton ).

variants.name: Slayton
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of Leighton (compare Layton ) with the addition of initial S-. Alternatively, perhaps a variant of Sladen or of Sleightholme, principally a habitational name from Sleightholme Dale in Kirkbymoorside, but perhaps occasionally from Sleightholme in Bowes or the lost Sleightholme in Lythe. The placenames derive from Old Norse sléttr ‘smooth, level’ + holmr ‘small island, water meadow’. This surname is now very rare in Britain. Compare Slaydon .

variants.name: Laughton
meanings: habitational name from Laughton en le Morthen in Yorkshire, Laughton in Leicestershire or any of the two places called Laughton in Lincolnshire (one near Gainsborough and another near Folkingham). The places are named with Old English lēac ‘leek’ + tūn ‘enclosure’, meaning ‘village or farm where leeks are grown’. It may sometimes have alternated with Leighton , which is mostly from placenames with the same etymology.

variants.name: Letton
meanings: English: habitational name, most probably from Letton in Norfolk or Latton in Essex. It could also be a variant of Leighton or Laughton . Most of the places so named have the same etymology as Letton and Latton, i.e. ‘farm where leeks are grown’ (Old English lēac-tūn). Another possibility is that it is a variant of Latten .

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Anne Leighton was born in 1587, in Feckenham, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Leighton, was 59 and her mother, Lady Elizabeth Knollys, was 38. She married Sir John St. John Of Lydiard Tregoze on 9 July 1604, in Hackney, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 19 September 1628, in her hometown, at the age of 41, and was buried in Lydiard Tregoze, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Anne Leighton est née en 1587, à Feckenham, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Leighton, avait 59 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Knollys, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John St. John Of Lydiard Tregoze le 9 juillet 1604, à Hackney, Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 19 septembre 1628, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterrée à Lydiard Tregoze, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Anne Leighton 1587 in Feckenham, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Leighton 59 und ihre Mutter Lady Elizabeth Knollys 38. Sie hat am 9. Juli 1604 in Hackney, Middlesex, England Sir John St. John Of Lydiard Tregoze geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 19. September 1628 im Alter von 41 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Lydiard Tregoze, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Anne Leighton è nata il nel 1587 nel Feckenham, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas Leighton, aveva 59 anni e sua madre, Lady Elizabeth Knollys, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Sir John St. John Of Lydiard Tregoze il 9 luglio 1604, nel Hackney, Middlesex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 19 settembre 1628, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolta a Lydiard Tregoze, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Anne Leightonが1587年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアフエクエンハムで生まれた時，父Thomas Leightonは59歳，母Lady Elizabeth Knollysは38歳であった。1604年7月9日にイギリスミッドレセックスハクニーでSir John St. John Of Lydiard Tregozeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1628年9月19日に故郷で41歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアリディアルド トレゴズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Anne Leighton(이)가 1587년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 프c켄함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Leighton(은)는 59세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Knollys(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1604년 7월 9일 영국 미들레세스 해c니에서 Sir John St. John Of Lydiard Tregoze(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1628년 9월 19일 그녀의 고향에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 리디아르드 트레고즈에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Anne Leighton nasceu em 1587, em Feckenham, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Leighton, tinha 59 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Knollys, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John St. John Of Lydiard Tregoze em 9 de julho de 1604, em Hackney, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 19 de setembro de 1628, em sua cidade natal, com 41 anos, e foi sepultada em Lydiard Tregoze, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Anne Leighton родилась в 1587 г. в местности феккенам, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Leighton было 59 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Knollys, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John St. John Of Lydiard Tregoze 9 июля 1604 г. в местности хаккни, миддлесекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 19 сентября 1628 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 41 год и была похоронена в местности лидярд трегоз, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Anne Leighton nació en 1587, en Feckenham, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Leighton, tenía 59 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth Knollys, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Sir John St. John Of Lydiard Tregoze el 9 de julio de 1604, en Hackney, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 19 de septiembre de 1628, en su pueblo, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultada en Lydiard Tregoze, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
